title: Feedback System
description: Share your thoughts and suggestions directly in the app. We read every piece of feedback and use it to improve SlateOne!

title: Enhanced Reports
description: Generate professional production reports with improved layouts, better formatting, and more export options. Perfect for sharing with your team.

title: Improved Scene Analysis
description: Our AI now provides more accurate breakdowns with better character detection and prop identification.

title: Performance Improvements
description: Faster script uploads, quicker analysis, and smoother navigation throughout the app.
